testCase.name: json-salvage.util parses valid JSON directly
json-salvage.util strips markdown fences before parsing
json-salvage.util extracts a JSON object from surrounding text
json-salvage.util removes trailing commas before closing braces
json-salvage.util fixes invalid LaTeX backslash escapes inside JSON strings
json-salvage.util fixInvalidJsonStringEscapes doubles only illegal escapes
json-salvage.util truncates previews for logging
MarkdownImageExtractorService removes markdown image syntax and returns image metadata
MarkdownImageExtractorService extracts multiple explanation diagrams in order
MarkdownImageExtractorService prefers images from the source markdown block over AI output
MarkdownImageExtractorService extracts diagrams placed after the option list into question content
MarkdownImageExtractorService does not attach post-option diagrams to the last option label
MarkdownImageExtractorService falls back to source stem when AI unwraps Mathpix LaTeX
MarkdownImageExtractorService keeps AI stem when it is a different structured question despite source LaTeX
Phase 2 import validators and mapper validates a correct AI JSON payload with Zod
Phase 2 import validators and mapper rejects malformed AI JSON
Phase 2 import validators and mapper passes NEET business validation
Phase 2 import validators and mapper rejects wrong option count for NEET
Phase 2 import validators and mapper maps validated output to the Question schema shape with option UUIDs
Phase 2 import validators and mapper extracts question images into image metadata instead of question text
Phase 2 import validators and mapper assigns post-option Mathpix diagrams to the question stem, not the last option
Phase 2 import validators and mapper validates batch AI JSON payloads with Zod
Phase 2 import validators and mapper chunks all questions into a single batch by default
